# restaurant-ai-mcp

> MCP server for restaurant ai. Features optimize menu, calculate food cost, manage reservation. From MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- optimize_menu
- calculate_food_cost
- manage_reservation
- analyze_reviews
- check_allergens

## Install
```
pip install restaurant-ai-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/restaurant-ai-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
